title: Generate a brand theme for @fmmenchi/ui
description: Scaffolds a complete [data-theme] preset instantiated from the INSTALLED @fmmenchi/tokens contract (always in sync with your tokens version) and wires the validate-themes target so the theme is gated in CI.

name.description: Theme name — becomes the `data-theme` attribute value.
name.x-prompt: What is the theme name (data-theme value)?

project.description: The project the theme belongs to (gets the validate-themes target).

directory.description: Directory for the theme file, relative to the project root.

skipValidation.description: Do not wire the validate-themes target.

tokensPath.description: Advanced: explicit path to @fmmenchi/tokens' vars.css (when it cannot be resolved from the workspace root).
